_description: Red-team: contradictory credit values in the same evidence set. Extraction surfaced two conflicting credit facts (3 and 6).
_note: Current engine limitation: CourseEvidence has one value per field, so duplicate facts collapse to last-wins (6 here). That triggers a HARD credit-mismatch gap -> DENY against a 3-credit target. Ideal behavior would be NEEDS_MORE_INFO on contradiction detection; that requires either (a) extractor to emit a single reconciled fact, or (b) engine schema to accept List[EvidenceField] per field key. Tracked as future work.
